name: kibo-choicebox
title: Choicebox
author: Kibo UI
description: Presents radio choices as composable card rows.

changes: Replaced @repo/shadcn-ui radio-group and utility aliases with @/components/ui/radio-group and @/lib/utils.
Generated a stable control id when none is provided and passed it from ChoiceboxItem to ChoiceboxIndicator.
Narrowed ChoiceboxItem and ChoiceboxIndicator prop types to remove silently ignored wrapper props and the context-owned value.

modifications.change: Replaced Kibo's workspace-local aliases, generated a stable shared id for each label and radio indicator, and narrowed the wrapper prop surfaces to behavior they actually implement.
modifications.reason: Resolve imports through the host project's shadcn aliases, preserve the compound label association without duplicate caller wiring, and avoid advertising props that are silently ignored.
